member.name: T:TopicId
member.summary: Unique identifier for a topic (used by the consensus service).

member.name: M:TopicId.#ctor(System.Int64)_3
member.param:
the num part
Constructor that uses shard, realm and num should be used instead as shard and realm should not assume 0 value

member.name: M:TopicId.FromString(System.String)
member.summary: Create a topic id from a string.

member.name: M:TopicId.FromSolidityAddress(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve the topic id from a solidity address.
member.remarks: @deprecatedThis method is deprecated. Use {@link #fromEvmAddress(long, long, String)} instead.

member.name: M:TopicId.FromProtobuf(Proto.TopicId)
member.summary: Create a topic id from a protobuf.

member.name: M:TopicId.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a topic id from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:TopicId.ToSolidityAddress
member.returns: the solidity address as a string

member.name: M:TopicId.FromEvmAddress(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.String)
member.summary: Constructs a TopicId from shard, realm, and EVM address. The EVM address must be a "long zero address" (first 12 bytes are zero).
member.param: the EVM address as a hex string
member.exception: if the EVM address is not a valid long zero address

member.name: M:TopicId.ToEvmAddress
member.summary: Converts this TopicId to an EVM address string. Creates a solidity address using shard=0, realm=0, and the file number.
member.returns: the EVM address as a hex string

member.name: M:TopicId.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Extracts a protobuf representing the token id.

member.name: M:TopicId.Validate(Client)
member.exception: if entity ID is formatted poorly

member.name: M:TopicId.ValidateChecksum(Client)
member.summary: Verify that the client has a valid checksum.
member.exception: if entity ID is formatted poorly

member.name: M:TopicId.Tostringwithchecksum(Client)
member.summary: Create a string representation that includes the checksum.
member.returns: the string representation with the checksum
